items.name: Big Root
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This root boosts the amount of HP the holder restores to itself when it uses HP-stealing moves.

items.name: Black Belt
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This belt helps with focus and boosts the power of the holder's Fighting-type moves.

items.name: Black Glasses
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a pair of shady- looking glasses that boost the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

items.name: Bright Powder
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This glittery powder casts a tricky glare that lowers the accuracy of opposing Pokémon's moves.

items.name: Charcoal
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a combustible fuel that boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

items.name: Choice Scarf
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This curious scarf boosts the holder's Speed stat but only allows the use of a single move.

items.name: Damp Rock
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to rain, the rain will persist for longer than usual.

items.name: Dragon Fang
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This hard, sharp fang boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

items.name: Expert Belt
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of the holder's supereffective moves.

items.name: Fairy Feather
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This feather, which gleams faintly when hit by light, boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

items.name: Focus Band
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder is hit with a move that should knock it out, it may be able to endure with 1 HP.

items.name: Focus Sash
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder has full HP and it is hit with a move that should knock it out, it will endure with 1 HP—but only once.

items.name: Hard Stone
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a durable stone that boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.

items.name: Heat Rock
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to harsh sunlight, the sunlight will persist for longer than usual.

items.name: Icy Rock
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to snow, the snow will persist for longer than usual.

items.name: Iron Ball
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It lowers the holder's Speed stat and makes the holder vulnerable to Ground- type moves even if it is a Flying type or is levitating.

items.name: King's Rock
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It may cause the target to flinch whenever the holder successfully inflicts damage on them with an attack.

items.name: Leftovers
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It slowly but steadily restores the holder's HP.

items.name: Life Orb
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of the holder's moves, but the holder also loses a small amount of HP upon landing an attack.

items.name: Light Ball
items.effect: An item to be held by Pikachu. It's a mysterious orb that boosts Pikachu's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

items.name: Light Clay
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder uses protective moves like Light Screen or Reflect, their effects will last longer than usual.

items.name: Magnet
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a powerful magnet that boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

items.name: Mental Herb
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder will be able to shake off move-binding effects to move freely— but only once.

items.name: Metal Coat
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a special metallic coating that boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

items.name: Metronome
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of a move that's used repeatedly. Once the chain is broken, the move's power returns to normal.

items.name: Miracle Seed
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a seed imbued with life force that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

items.name: Muscle Band
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This headband exudes strength, slightly boosting the power of the holder's physical moves.

items.name: Mystic Water
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This teardrop-shaped gem boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

items.name: Never-Melt Ice
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a heat-repelling piece of ice that boosts the power of the holder's Ice- type moves.

items.name: Poison Barb
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This small poisonous barb boosts the power of the holder's Poison-type moves.

items.name: Quick Claw
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This light, sharp claw lets the holder occasionally unleash a move faster than it usually would.

items.name: Scope Lens
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a lens for scoping out weak points. It boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio.

items.name: Sharp Beak
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a long, sharp beak that boosts the power of the holder's Flying-type moves.

items.name: Shed Shell
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Hard and sturdy, this discarded carapace enables the holder to switch out of battle without fail.

items.name: Shell Bell
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder restores a little HP to itself every time it inflicts damage with an attack.

items.name: Silk Scarf
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of the holder's Normal-type moves.

items.name: Silver Powder
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a shiny silver powder that boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves.

items.name: Smooth Rock
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to a sandstorm, the storm will persist for longer than usual.

items.name: Soft Sand
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This loose, silky sand boosts the power of the holder's Ground-type moves.

items.name: Spell Tag
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

items.name: Twisted Spoon
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

items.name: White Herb
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It will restore any lowered stat in battle—but only once.

items.name: Wide Lens
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of the holder's moves.

items.name: Wise Glasses
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This thick pair of glasses slightly boosts the power of the holder's special moves.

items.name: Zoom Lens
items.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder acts after its target, its move will be more accurate than usual.

items.name: Aspear Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to thaw itself after being frozen.

items.name: Babiri Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Steel-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Charti Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Rock-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Cheri Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to free itself from paralysis.

items.name: Chesto Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to shake off its drowsiness.

items.name: Chilan Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a Normal-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Chople Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fighting-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Coba Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Flying-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Colbur Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dark-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Haban Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dragon-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Kasib Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ghost-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Kebia Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Poison-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Leppa Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 PP to a move.

items.name: Lum Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of any status condition it may have.

items.name: Occa Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fire-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Oran Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 HP to itself.

items.name: Passho Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Water-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Payapa Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Psychic-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Pecha Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to lift the effects of being poisoned from itself.

items.name: Persim Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of confusion.

items.name: Rawst Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of a burn.

items.name: Rindo Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Grass-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Roseli Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fairy-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Shuca Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ground-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Sitrus Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore a small amount of HP to itself.

items.name: Tanga Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Bug-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Wacan Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Electric-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

items.name: Yache Berry
items.effect: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ice-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.
